title: Ts@bo`iym #6650
definition:
Zeboim = "speckled"

 1) city and surrounding valley in Benjamin between Jericho and Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zeboim = "speckled"

 1) city and surrounding valley in Benjamin between Jericho and Jerusalem

    NASB:  a place prob. at S. end of the Dead Sea
